feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Activate activity-based consolidation of Investments
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

we would like to use the activity-Based Consolidation of Investments. As this is not activated by default in the cloud solution anymore, we request to activate the activity-Based Consolidation of Investments in our cloud system, as we do not wish to use rule-based consolidation. Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to automate the Audit Extraction Data related to ITGC in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi Community Experts, 

I am looking for a solution, where we can automate the process of extracting the data related ITGC audit controls and if there is any possibility of the same ?

We have few ITGC Controls in place which utilizes the application in S4HANA Public cloud such as i.e. "Manage Business Users", "Manager Business Roles", "Import Collection", "Display Technical Roles" etc which would help us to do a check to make sure that the audit regulations are met.

Any such lead on this would be much appreciated. 

 

Thanks & Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Run Foreign Trade Regulations Z4
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone help here?

Application: Run Foreign Trade Regulations Z4.

The customer pulls an XML file from the SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud, but it contains missing data and cannot be sent to the Federal Office.

Description of the problem:
Data is missing that was actually created in customising for the company codes.

The following data is missing and is not contained in the XML file:
Economic sector
Company address
Telephone number
Contact person
E-mail address
Company number
---> although this data is set in customising (foreign trade and balance of payments). (see screen1 and 2)

In addition, the XML structure does not contain a field for the commodity code.
Is there a way to insert a commodity code field in this XML file structure? If so, how?

Many thanks in advance.

Yours sincerely
N.S.

entry.title: How to Check User T-Code/Tile Usage (Last 2 Months)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,


We need to check which T-Codes or Fiori tiles were used by user in the last 2 months.


Kindly let us know how we can view this data — is there any specific tile, report, or method available?


Please share the steps or guidance as soon as possible.


Regards,


Udayraj K


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Changing the transaction status of a position flow without actually posting it.
entry.content:
• How to change the status of the position flow into fixed from being scheduled? 
  • The status of a position flow remains as scheduled even after manual posting.
  • The scheduled position flow is picked up in subsequent posting runs, despite having been posted previously.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there any way to use se38 report in SAP public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Scenario: I'm using sflight table but its delivered empty record. So, sap help portal suggesting use SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR report. problem is SAP public cloud is not allowing to execute reports (SE38). is there any way to use SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR?

Regards,

Nirojan.

entry.title: Why Evaluated Receipt Settlement (ERS) schedule job always have no document selected
entry.content:
Hello, We're implementing HongKong company for Public Cloud 2502 version. When we test the 2LH Schedule Supplier Invoice Jobs, select the Job template "Evaluated Receipt Settlement (ERS)", no matter we select by supplier, or goods receipt document, or purchase document, always no document selected.

Do you meet such problems? and how to solve it? Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,

Grace

entry.title: Implementation of German Electronic Invoices in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
1. Can we implement German electronic invoices with only a Dutch company code?
2. Is the DRC cloud edition solution required to implement German electronic invoices?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Event-Based Revenue Recognition - Customer projects SPTM Key
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,
We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public and have some customer projects managed with revenue recognition key SPTM (Time & Expenses) and COSPTM as assignment rule.

However, when we post expenses to these projects (e.g. with transaction RKU1), the system does not trigger the corresponding event-based revenue recognition posting.
We have checked that the GL accounts are included in YBPS_E000, and also that this cost element group is included in the sources YE0 and YS0.

Could you please help us with this issue?
Thanks in advance

María

entry.title: TRM Transaction Management - Reverse Cash Flow
entry.content:
Dear All,

Customer has implemented S/4HANA Public Cloud including Treasury Management.

Customer is trying to reverse posted Cash Flow. According to process steps App Manage Financial Transactions in Edit Mode, Cash Flow tab, and then choose Editing Mode -> Reverse. The Reverse option is greyed. 

Please advise how this could be solved and cash flow reversed.

Kind regards,

Slađana

entry.title: Power of Attorney vs. Payment Approvers: Key Differences, Use Cases, and Legal Considerations
entry.content:
• The functional and operational differences between PoA and payment approvers.
• Clear scenarios or business cases where the use of PoA adds value beyond payment approval setup.
• Any legal, audit, or compliance implications tied to PoA usage in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Mass Creation of Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Our user hope to mass upload purchase orders.

Is there any method? Can we teach user to use data migration tool to upload PO after project go-live?

I found this scope item  Mass Creation of Purchase Orders (6VW) in help portal .

Whether business automation tool and RPA need additional license?

Best Regards

Gloria

entry.title: Cumulative, Opening balance calculation SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud implementation and using Key User Extensibility to create Custom CDS Views. I need to calculate balances of each JE posted to GL Account:

1. Cumulative Balance – a running total based on a date or period

2. Opening Balance – the balance as of the beginning of the selected period.

I am aware that in public cloud, we are limited to certain functionalities. 

Could anyone guide me on:

Is it possible to implement such logic using only Key User tools (e.g., Custom CDS Views))?

Thanks.

entry.title: Facing an issue while executing the Actions Artifacts in SAP Business Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Team

We are working in SAP Public cloud with some BTP Services activated. We are facing some technical challenges while building those Build process detail and the issues are provided below for your quick reference

Scenario Name: Project Budget Approval

In SAP Public cloud, budgets can be managed within Enterprise Projects and allocates the budget directly, the system does not provide structured approval workflow. In this Scenario we trying to create the workflow for budget approval and need to send the notification before importing the Budget. 

BTP services activated: SAP BTP Cockpit, SAP Business Process Automation, SAP Business Application Studio, SAP Build Workzone (Advanced Edition)

Progress So Far:

  • We have created a communication system between BTP services and built a business process using a standard template from the SAP BPA Store.
  • We then imported the UI task file from BPA and deployed it in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS).
  • In SAP Build Work Zone, we created a site and added the application tiles to initiate the workflow.
  • We have installed the SAP Desktop Agent and Deployed the Business Process in the Environment

Where we blocked:

  • I am facing an issue while triggering the API (API_FINPLANNINGDATA_SRV)

Could you please provide guidance on the following issue?

entry.title: API for outgoing payment
entry.content:
We need the "outgoing payment's" API. Is it possible to post and clear using Apps Post an outgoing payment with the API?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Supplier Role & Company code extensions in Supplier/Business Partner MasterData in S/4H Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Good Day!

This is regarding role and company code extensions in supplier/business partner master data. A business partner is created with employee and employment role as a part of current design. However, the supplier role and company code extensions have to be done manually which is a tedious task. Hence, we are exploring options to automate this process through templates or configurations or any other source. Any suggestions would be appreciated.


Regards,
Abha Hardikar

entry.title: Set a field as mandatory (Manage Sales Quotations - Version 2 and Manage Business Partner)
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

we want to set a custom field as mandatory in the App "Manage Sales Quotations - Version 2". We have also found a custom logic for this use case (Custom Field Properties in Sales Document Headers - SD_SLS_FIELDPROP_HEAD or Custom Field Properties in Sales Document Items - SD_SLS_FIELDPROP_ITEM). 

The problem is that the BAdI is only called when I use the “old” app "Manage Sales Quotations" (HTML GUI) and not via the new app "Manage Sales Quotations - Version 2". However, we want to get our customers to work with the new apps for usability reasons and it is also much easier to display the custom fields at a certain point in the apps.

Is there a solution for this? Can the BAdI also be called via the new app? 

For Business Partner (Manage Business Partner), I have not found any custom logic to make a field mandatory. Is there a solution?

Kind Regards

Katharina

entry.title: Standard Localization - Organizational Structure
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Our clientis currently working on the roll-out of the public cloud for locations in various countries. With regard to the organizational structure, they would like to use SAP's standard numbers as a guide.
For example, the standard company code for Germany is 1010, for the USA 1710.
Is there an overview of the standard organizational units for the different countries?

We would be very happy to hear from you!

Best regards
Talke

entry.title: Guidance on Monthly Financial Data Upload to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Finance and Technical Experts,

I would greatly appreciate your suggestions and insights regarding the monthly upload of financial data into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (2SL) from Oracle NetSuite, which is used by another company within the same corporate group.

We are looking for best practices not only from a technical implementation perspective but also in terms of financial accuracy and audit compliance.

Background and Constraints:

  • NetSuite is an audit-compliant ERP system and already performs tax calculations.
  • The extracted journal entry item-level data includes tax information, so recalculating taxes in SAP must be avoided.
  • The source data contains over 40,000 journal entry lines per month, and uploading the full dataset can take 3–5 hours, which is not acceptable due to performance constraints.

Our current approach:

  • Instead of uploading item-level journal entries, we are planning to upload summary-level data by G/L account.

Request:

  • Do you see any concerns or potential risks with this summary-data upload approach?
  • Are there any technical or financial integrity issues we should be aware of?
  • What best practices would you recommend to ensure accurate and efficient integration?

Your experience and guidance would be very helpful. Thank you in advance!

Best regards,
Takashi

entry.title: Fiori Push Notification with Situations handling or with another Notification provider?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In S/4Hana 2023 we want to trigger a push Notification

  • when an order of a specific order type is newly created
  • to specific users (can be determined from a custom CDS view)
  • on a mobile device or Fiori Shell bar
  • without doing a (bigger) development, just config

 How to implement this?

 Option 1: Situations Handling

There seems to be no standard framework available to cover this, so it seems we need to use the extended framework of situations handling. Can the requirements be fulfilled with the extended framework of situation handling?

Option 2: Workflow

Using Workflow and then the Notification provider SAP_BUSINESS_WORKFLOW would probably work. But then we’d need a developer with workflow skills, which we don’t have.

 Option 3: Other notification providers?

Can we use instead of Situations Handling or Workflow another notification provider (/IWNGW/BEP_NPREG) which is already available? I can find in S/4H2023 FP02 around 88 notification providers. Are there other notification providers with which my scenario can be fulfilled and without doing a bigger development?

I’m wondering e.g. if following provider would be helpful?

SAP_FIORI_REFERENCE_APPS    CL_SEPMRA_NOTIF_PROVIDER

Thanks in advance!
